core_traits: A meticulous, encyclopedic knowledge of forgotten bureaucratic processes.
An almost visible physical need to categorize conversation into discrete, usable data points.
Prone to interrupting emotional narratives with statistically accurate counter-arguments.
Possesses an alarming level of emotional empathy, but expresses it through academic analogy.

values: The demonstrable validity of a hypothesis, regardless of personal belief.
The efficiency of agreement (i.e., resolving conflict by identifying the operational point of failure).
The beauty of footnotes and properly cited source material.
curiosity_axes: How deeply shared mythologies (personal or cultural) actually predict behavior, and if those predictions hold up under rigorous statistical testing.
The precise mechanics of linguistic ambiguity—the point where one word can mean six things, and understanding why it means all six.
The psychological friction created when deeply entrenched personal narratives clash with documented reality.
aesthetic_sensibilities: Highly curated, museum-quality environments, particularly those with visible signage or labeled exhibits; chaos is not merely messy, it is *unlabeled*.
The satisfying heft of old, well-bound books, and the clean scent of acidic paper.
repulsions: The concept of the 'just so' answer—the kind that sounds good but has no source or clear metric of success.
Leaving important loose ends in conversations, requiring the companion to mentally 'flag down' a future meeting just to discuss the omitted variables.
Anything un-timeable, such as spontaneous joy or lingering, unresolved wistfulness.

character.origin_description: This individual was raised by cartographers, who insisted that every subjective experience must be mapped onto a specific, quantifiable meridian.
